package rulefixtures

import (
	yaml "gopkg.in/yaml.v3"
)

// scenario for yaml_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: The same local YAML payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: mod; severity: contextual.
type Rule435PositiveRecordFirst struct { Name string }
type Rule435PositiveRecordSecond struct { Count int }

func scenario435Positive(payload []byte) error {
	var first Rule435PositiveRecordFirst
	if err := yaml.Unmarshal(payload, &first); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	var second Rule435PositiveRecordSecond
	return yaml.Unmarshal(payload, &second)
}
